meta.title: Doctore.ar - Digital Solutions for Healthcare Professionals
meta.description: We transform your medical practice management with cutting-edge technology. Online appointments, digital health records and more.

hero.title: The new era of digital health
hero.subtitle: Technology solutions that flow with your medical practice. Appointment management, health records and more, all in one place.

product.title: TurnosMedicos
product.subtitle: The most complete appointment management system in the market
product.description: Simplify your practice administration with our intuitive platform. Your patients book online, you focus on what matters: their health.

services.title: Everything you need for your practice
services.description: Comprehensive solutions specifically designed for healthcare professionals in Argentina.

appointments.title: Appointment Management
appointments.description: Complete online booking system with automatic confirmations and WhatsApp reminders.

records.title: Health Records
records.description: Secure digitization of medical records with quick access and regulatory compliance.

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Electronic invoicing, insurance management and integrated prepaid health plans.

telemedicine.title: Telemedicine
telemedicine.description: Virtual consultations with HD video, virtual waiting room and electronic prescriptions.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.description: Dashboards with key metrics, patient trends and revenue projections.

support.title: 24/7 Support
support.description: Dedicated support team available whenever you need them, every day.

pricing.title: Choose the perfect plan for your practice
pricing.description: Flexible plans that adapt to your practice size. No long-term contracts.

about.title: Transforming digital health in Argentina
about.description: We are a team passionate about technology and health. Since 2020, we help medical professionals optimize their practices with innovative and accessible solutions.

innovation.title: Constant Innovation
innovation.description: We continuously update our platform with the latest technologies.

security.title: Security First
security.description: Encrypted data and full compliance with health regulations.

support.title: Human Support
support.description: Local team that understands the needs of the Argentine health system.

contact.title: We're here to help
contact.description: Have questions? Our team is ready to assist you and find the best solution for your practice.

footer.description: Digital solutions for healthcare professionals. Simplifying medical practice management across Argentina.
